description: Style Note adidas perfumes come with the promise of long lasting fragrance and patented Fragrance Booster Technology to take you through the day and way into the night. Product Details adidas's Ice Dive comes in an aerosol spray canister and has an ozonic fragrance Top notes are kiwi, lavender, mandarin orange, yuzu, mint, grapefruit, anise and bergamot, middle notes are sandalwood, patchouli and geranium and base notes are tonka bean, musk, vanilla, pepper and ambergris Caution Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying in eyes Size 100 ml
